product: Connect Genie spaces to Microsoft Copilot Studio (Public Preview)
tagline: Connecting Databricks Genie spaces as tools in Microsoft Copilot Studio agents is in Public Preview.
what_it_does: Connecting Databricks Genie spaces as tools in Microsoft Copilot Studio agents is in Public Preview. To use this feature, enable the Managed MCP Servers preview in your workspace and add your Genie space as a tool when configuring a Copilot Studio agent. This page explains how to use your Databricks data in Microsoft Copilot Studio after creating a connection.
why_it_matters: Reduces operational overhead and unlocks new capabilities for data teams on Databricks.
plain_summary: Connecting Databricks Genie spaces as tools in Microsoft Copilot Studio agents is in Public Preview. To use this feature, enable the Managed MCP Servers preview in your workspace and add your Genie space as a tool when configuring a Copilot Studio agent.
key_takeaway: Connecting Databricks Genie spaces as tools in Microsoft Copilot Studio agents is in Public Preview.
